sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports pain in the left hand, describing it as sharp and intermittent. He also reports pain in his feet, noting it is a dull ache. The patient reports experiencing bruising on his left forearm. The patient reports nail ridges.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Physical exam reveals nail ridges. The patient's skin is intact and without bruising.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has psoriasis and psoriatic arthritis. The patient's nail ridges are a significant finding.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Order blood work to evaluate inflammation. Schedule a blood draw for follow-up. Continue methotrexate. Discontinue prednisone.
